DEMAND FOR JURY ON MEMO SETTING FILED BY PLAINTIFF HEALY, EVELYN SET FOR JURY TRIAL ON APR-28-1994 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 01 NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL FILED

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PEOPLES, CONNIE THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1025 SCOTT ST, #5, S.F, CA. $1,704.30 RENT, $110.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,814.30, STAYED UNTIL MAY-11-1994, LEASE FORFEITED, WRIT TO ISSUE IMMEDIATELY, BUT EVICTION STAYED TO 8AM, 5-11-94. DEPOSIT W/INTEREST RETAINED BY PL. NO STAYS ON EVICTION. PREMISES TO BE LEFT FREE OF OCCUPANTS, POSSESIONS & DEBRIS. UPON DEF. COMPLETING TERMS OF STIP, PL. TO S/A JUDGMENT & DISM. SEE FILE FOR COMPLETE JUDGMENT DETAILS.
